docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF CAITLYN M. HARRIS IN SUPPORT OF DEFENDANTS OPPOSITION TO PLAINTIFFS MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 79841972) FILED BY DEFENDANT GREEN, KIMBERLY ZARC CONSTRUCTION HU, JACK
MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-25-26 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE AMENDED COMPLAINT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: GRANTED. SEE MINI-MINUTES FOR THE COURT'S COMPLETE RULING. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, NOT REPORTED

REMARK: PLAINTIFF'S EX PARTE APPLICATION TO SHORTEN TIME TO HEAR MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE AMENDED COMPLAINT IS HEARD AND GRANTED. MOTION TO BE HEARD ON JUN-25-2026. OPPOSITION TO BE FILED AND SERVED NO LATER THAN JUN-22-2026. REPLY IS WAIVED. (301/CVA)
